case_title: SF AUTO RETURN VS. DAVID FRANK MIRABELLI

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-13-2007 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC. 13, 2007 BY COMMISSIONER SLAVIT; CLERK: F. RAYRAY. NOT REPORTED (506) PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT . NO EXHIBITS RETAINED.
NOTICE OF INTENTION TO ISSUE AMENDED AND CORRECTED JUDGMENT AND ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE, RETURNED UNDELIVERED. SENT TO DEFENDANT.
ORDER FOR AMENDED JUDGMENT RE: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING OF MAY 28, 2010

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-13-2007 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC.13, 2007 BY COMMISSIONER SLAVIT. CLERK: F. RAYRAY. NOT REPORTED (506). PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED.
ORDER AMENDED JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT DAVID FRANK MIRABELLI, RETURNED "ADDRESSED UNDELIVERED/UNABLE TO FORWARD".

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SF AUTO RETURN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MIRABELLI, DAVID FRANK $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $165.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,665.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
